mainEntity.name: What databases can I use with Data Explorer?

acceptedAnswer.text: Data Explorer currently supports PostgreSQL databases.

mainEntity.name: What can Resona AI do inside Data Explorer?

acceptedAnswer.text: Resona AI is a feature inside Data Explorer that can help with query drafting, table understanding, advanced analysis, trends, anomalies, charts, and generated reports.
Data Explorer supports CSV, JSON, NDJSON, Excel, and SQL exports for individual tables, plus full schema export.

mainEntity.name: Is Data Explorer read-only by default?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes. The Data Explorer docs describe the product as read-only by default, allowing only SELECT statements unless write access is explicitly enabled for a connection.
